subject: [PATCH v3 3/7] mm: list_lru: move list dead check to lock_list_lru_of_memcg()

reviews.author: Shakeel Butt
reviews.summary: Acknowledged the patch without raising any concerns or objections.
reviews.raw_body:
On Wed, Mar 18, 2026 at 03:53:21PM -0400, Johannes Weiner wrote:
> Only the MEMCG variant of lock_list_lru() needs to check if there is a
> race with cgroup deletion and list reparenting. Move the check to the
> caller, so that the next patch can unify the lock_list_lru() variants.
> 
> Reviewed-by: David Hildenbrand (Arm) <david@kernel.org>
> Signed-off-by: Johannes Weiner <hannes@cmpxchg.org>

Acked-by: Shakeel Butt <shakeel.butt@linux.dev>

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch moves the check for list dead condition from lock_list_lru() to its caller, specifically in lock_list_lru_of_memcg(). This is done to prepare for unifying the variants of lock_list_lru(), which will be addressed in a subsequent patch.
